positive.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for platypus_positive.tptp
% SZS output start Proof for platypus_positive.tptp
2. ~has_teeth(platypus) [input(axiom)]
3. mammal(platypus) [input(axiom)]
6. mammal(platypus) & ~has_teeth(platypus) [input(conjecture)]
7. ~(mammal(platypus) & ~has_teeth(platypus)) [negated conjecture 6]
8. ~mammal(platypus) | has_teeth(platypus) [ennf transformation 7]
13. ~has_teeth(platypus) [cnf transformation 2]
14. mammal(platypus) [cnf transformation 3]
17. ~mammal(platypus) | has_teeth(platypus) [cnf transformation 8]
19. 1 <=> has_teeth(platypus) [avatar definition]
23. 2 <=> mammal(platypus) [avatar definition]
26. 1 | ~2 [avatar split clause 17,23,19]
27. 2 [avatar split clause 14,23]
28. ~1 [avatar split clause 13,19]
s1. ~2 | 1 [sat_conversion 26]
s2. 2 [sat_conversion 27]
s3. ~1 [sat_conversion 28]
s4. # [rat s1,s3,s2]
29. $false [avatar sat refutation s4]
% SZS output end Proof for platypus_positive.tptp
% Termination reason: Refutation

negative.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for platypus_negative.tptp
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u17,axiom,
    platypus != human).

cnf(u14,axiom,
    has_teeth(sK0)).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    has_teeth(human)).

cnf(u18,negated_conjecture,
    ~has_teeth(platypus)).
